mean_cn: n.物质的化学组成(或性质)；化学
mean_en: the scientific study of the structure of substances, how they react when combined or in contact with one another, and how they behave under different conditions
sentence: One of the chemistries of iron is that it may rust.
sentence_trans: 会生锈是铁的化学性质之一。
word_etyma: chemist化学家 + ry表名词 → chemistry化学
